judge_reason: Description A details two stamps with specific quoted text (e.g., 'DECLASSED', 'Authority: NND 90986'), while Description B states there are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts present on the page, contradicting the visual content described in A.
original_image_tags: A rectangular stamp in the bottom left corner. The top half is blue with white text "DECLASSIFIED". The bottom half is white with black text "Authority: NND 90986".
A rectangular stamp in the bottom right corner. Text reads "SEARCHED / INDEXED / SERIALIZED / FILED / MAY 2 4 1950 / FBI - NEW ORLEANS". There is a handwritten initial or mark in the "INDEXED" line.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten FBI document page titled “SUMMARY OF INFORMATION,” with a red “CONFIDENTIAL” marking at the top and bottom, dated 23 May 1950, and a blue “DECLASSIFIED” sticker near the lower left; no photograph is visible on the page.*
